project_cn: 天津地域文化文创产品智能生成 LoRA 工具链
positioning: 自研微调模型+自研工具+开源底座
primary_scene: 泥人张彩塑文创产品生成

base_model.role: 天津地域文化文创专属图像生成大模型底座
base_model.notes: 实际训练时可替换为已授权、可商用或内网部署的开源文生图底座。

dataset.core_description: 天津泥人张彩塑授权高清作品原始数据，目标规模约1300张。
dataset.expanded_description: 中国传统雕塑、美术、纹饰、民俗符号与文化概念扩充数据，目标规模约6000张。
dataset.annotation_standard: 结构化+美学化双维度标注

generation.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, watermark, copied logo, real brand logo, celebrity likeness, inaccurate heritage symbol, distorted clay texture, extra fingers, broken product structure, unsafe or sensitive content

prompts: nrz_clay_heritage_style, Tianjin painted clay figurine inspired cultural creative product, gift box mockup, handmade clay texture, traditional color palette, premium souvenir design
nrz_clay_heritage_style, eastern character figurine design, rounded clay volume, vivid folk expression, cultural exhibition product render
nrz_clay_heritage_style, Tianjin regional culture poster, painted clay figurine visual language, clean composition, product launch key visual
nrz_clay_heritage_style, cultural creative fridge magnet set, traditional costume details, handcrafted clay surface, white studio background
